name: Drum of Endurance
description: A relic that enchants the bodies of those around it for swifter movement in times of crisis.

abilities.name: Endurance
abilities.description: Grants movement and attack speed to all nearby allies for a short while on cast. Cooldown: 45. Radius: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 13%. Attack Speed Bonus: 35. Duration: 6.

abilities.name: Swiftness Aura
abilities.description: Increases the movement speed of nearby allies by a flat amount. Radius: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 15. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.
